changelog: Multi-user two-way sync (one shared key, routed by Jellyfin user id). Leave username empty to sync all users. Faster pull (3s) and fresh rating reads.
description: Two-way sync of watched, rating and favourite (movies & series) with the Jellyboxd app, for every user.
name: Jellyboxd Sync
overview: Keep watched / rating / favourite in sync with Jellyboxd.
